title: 美國眾議員Ron Wright：數以百萬香港人為自由冒生命危險 美國需要令持續威脅自由的中共政權問責

replies.msg:
While many politicians are celebrating the 70th Anniversary of the People's Republic of China, millions of #HongKong citizens are risking their lives for freedom.

The United States needs to hold China's Communist Regime accountable as they continue to threaten freedom every day.

https://twitter.com/RepRonWright/status/1179108120590782466?s=09
